issue.message: Call requires version 13 of the U Extensions SDK (current min is 0): `toPlatformPlannedExerciseSessionRecord`
Call requires version 13 of the U Extensions SDK (current min is 0): `toPlatformSkinTemperatureRecord`

Must be one of: BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_INTERSTITIAL_FLUID, BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_CAPILLARY_BLOOD, BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_PLASMA, BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_SERUM, BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_TEARS, BloodGlucoseRecord.SPECIMEN_SOURCE_WHOLE_BLOOD

Must be one of: BloodGlucoseRecord.RELATION_TO_MEAL_GENERAL, BloodGlucoseRecord.RELATION_TO_MEAL_FASTING, BloodGlucoseRecord.RELATION_TO_MEAL_BEFORE_MEAL, BloodGlucoseRecord.RELATION_TO_MEAL_AFTER_MEAL
Must be one of: SexualActivityRecord.PROTECTION_USED_PROTECTED, SexualActivityRecord.PROTECTION_USED_UNPROTECTED
Use of synchronized methods is not recommended
Unknown nullability; explicitly declare as `@Nullable` or `@NonNull` to improve Kotlin interoperability; see https://developer.android.com/kotlin/interop#nullability_annotations
